overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character entering a traditional Japanese-style back office through a beaded curtain to speak with a fixer named Wakako, then exiting back to the neon-lit reception area. The scene transitions from a dark corridor with blue neon lighting to a warmly lit interior with cultural decorations, then back to the magenta-lit reception terminal area.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit reception corridor with security desk

events.description: approaching and passing through the circular beaded curtain doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through the reception area toward the back office entrance

notable_agents.action: receptionist standing behind the counter observing the player approach

entered.detail: counter with glowing blue neon strip lighting and glass partition
circular black beaded curtain separating reception from back office
illuminated directional signs above the reception area

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a dark cyberpunk reception corridor illuminated by blue neon strips. A receptionist stands behind a glass counter to the right as the camera approaches a circular beaded curtain doorway leading to the back office.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese-style back office with desk and wall decorations

events.description: transitioning from neon corridor lighting to warm interior lamplight
camera pans right to examine the bonsai tree and dragon mural on the wall

agents.ego_description: engaging in dialogue with Wakako while observing the traditional office decor and furnishings

notable_agents.action: Wakako sitting behind the wooden desk speaking with the player character

entered.detail: large dark wooden desk with scattered papers and a bright rectangular lamp
traditional Japanese circular wooden screen with vertical slats
potted decorative pine tree in a ceramic pot against the yellow wall
large wall painting of a serpentine dragon with birds and clouds
flatscreen TV displaying colorful abstract geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Inside the warmly lit office, Wakako sits behind a wooden desk covered in papers. The room features traditional Japanese decor including a bonsai tree, circular wall screen, and a large dragon mural. The camera pans around the space, revealing a television and various cultural artifacts while dialogue options appear on screen.

events.description: exiting the office through the beaded curtain back into the neon-lit reception area

agents.ego_description: leaving the back office and returning to the reception corridor

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair working at a computer terminal behind glass

entered.detail: computer terminal with holographic display where a woman is working
tall metal locker cabinets against the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The player exits the office through the beaded curtain, returning to the magenta-lit reception area. A woman works at a terminal station visible through a glass window, with metal lockers lining the opposite wall. The scene ends with the player facing the terminal area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cold, neon-lit cyberpunk corridor into a warmly lit traditional Japanese office before returning to the vibrant reception area. It begins by gliding through a dark hallway illuminated by blue neon strips, passing a receptionist behind a glass counter toward a circular beaded curtain. As the camera pushes through the curtain, the environment shifts abruptly to a cozy interior featuring a wooden desk, a bonsai tree, and a large dragon mural on the wall. The camera pans across these cultural artifacts and a television screen before turning back toward the exit. Finally, the view passes through the beaded curtain once more, transitioning from the warm office tones back into a magenta-lit space with metal lockers and a woman working at a terminal station.
